message:
test(robot): add validation contract tests for section schema compliance (bd-j9jo3.9.7)

Adds 706-line test suite verifying the robot section contract layer:

- Schema ID format: validates ntm:robot:<surface>:v<n> naming convention
  across all registered surfaces in GetRobotRegistry()
- Versioning rules: ensures schema versions are positive integers
- Required/optional field semantics: tests that required fields are always
  present and non-empty in serialized output
- Deterministic ordering: verifies sections maintain stable sort order
  across multiple serialization rounds
- Action-handoff shapes: validates that action payloads conform to their
  declared schemas
- Request identity: ensures each robot request carries a unique trace ID
- Operator attention-state rules: tests attention escalation paths
- Error semantics: verifies error responses include required diagnostic
  fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
